case_title: ZAZA DAVITADZE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-17-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-02-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ZAZA DAVITADZE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-17-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-01-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-16-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-19-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-19-2010 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Continued To Jul-19-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/19/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
